[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 099/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. NE OF KOŁOBRZEG
AREA BOUNDED BY POSITIONS
54° 18’ 51,60” N 015° 42’ 16,91” E
54° 22’ 22,04” N 015° 39’ 01,45” E
54° 23’ 02,04” N 015° 41’ 08,14” E
54° 19’ 31,55” N 015° 44’ 23,47” E
IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY FROM 22:00 ON 11.05.2026 TO 21:59 ON 13.05.2026.
REF: ORDER NR 1/26 OF THE DIRECTOR OF THE MARITIME OFFICE IN SZCZECIN
CLOSED AREA
CANCEL THIS MSG 132159 UTC MAY
